name: sqlquery-run
title: Pathling SQLQuery Run Operation
description: This operation executes a SQL query against materialised ViewDefinition tables within the Pathling server. The query is provided as a Library resource conforming to the SQLQuery profile from the SQL on FHIR v2 specification.

parameter.name: queryResource
parameter.documentation: An inline Library resource conforming to the SQLQuery profile. Contains the SQL query, ViewDefinition dependencies, and parameter declarations.

parameter.name: queryReference
parameter.documentation: A reference to a stored Library resource conforming to the SQLQuery profile.

parameter.name: _format
parameter.documentation: The output format for the query results. Supported values are 'ndjson' (default), 'csv', 'json', 'parquet', and 'fhir'. The 'fhir' format returns a Parameters resource (application/fhir+json) with one repeating 'row' parameter per result row, each column rendered as a part with a typed value[x].

parameter.name: header
parameter.documentation: For CSV output, whether to include a header row. Defaults to true.

parameter.name: _limit
parameter.documentation: Maximum number of rows to return in the result.

parameter.name: parameters
parameter.documentation: Runtime parameter bindings as a Parameters resource. Each entry's name must match a Library.parameter declaration, and its value[x] must match the declared FHIR type.
